single_day.name: Dagsbillet (Day Ticket)
single_day.description: Full day access to LEGO House experience zones

single_day.name: Eftermiddagsbillet (Afternoon Ticket)
single_day.description: Afternoon entry from 3 PM on days with 7 PM closing

multi_attraction.name: LEGO House & LEGOLAND Kombibillet (Combo Ticket)
multi_attraction.description: Single ticket providing access to both LEGO House and LEGOLAND park

subscription.name: Årskort (Annual Pass)
subscription.description: Unlimited access for one year to LEGO House
features: 25% discount on LEGO Masters Academy through May 31, 2026

beginner.name: Splash into the Bricks - Level 1
beginner.description: Build your own LEGO pond, animate creatures, complete interactive challenges

intermediate.name: Build Me Up - Level 2
intermediate.description: Upgrade building skills by personalizing your own LEGO minifigure

advanced.name: aROUND the bricks we go - Level 3
advanced.description: Master advanced building techniques including S.N.O.T. method

year_round.name: Det ultimative LEGO ophold (Ultimate LEGO Stay)
year_round.description: Combines LEGO House, LEGOLAND Billund, and overnight accommodation

seasonal.name: LEGO House Vinterophold (Winter Stay)
seasonal.description: Winter holiday package with LEGO House, hotel stay, and indoor pool access
features: Billund Bad indoor swimming pool access

tours.name: LEGO House Experience + Factory Visit
tours.description: Full day at LEGO House with exclusive behind-the-scenes factory tour

tours.name: LEGO Fan Tour
tours.description: Group tour with 25 LEGO enthusiasts from worldwide locations

tours.name: LEGO Inside Tour
tours.description: Ultimate 3-day LEGO fan experience with exclusive access to restricted areas

exclusive_events.name: LEGO House Brick Tour
exclusive_events.description: Private group experience with personal guide and exclusive Meet & Greet with LEGO designer

exclusive_events.name: LEGO House Exclusive Designer Evening
exclusive_events.description: Special evening event for LEGO Space fans

group_visits.name: Group Tickets (20+ persons)
group_visits.description: Group rates for creative and playful day at LEGO House

group_visits.name: Playful Tour (Group Guided Tours)
group_visits.description: Private guide experience learning about the home of the brick

corporate.name: Private Venue Rental
corporate.description: Entire LEGO House rental for corporate or organizational events

social_emotional.name: Fish Designer
social_emotional.description: Emotional competency building through LEGO design

cognitive.name: Test Driver
cognitive.description: Cognitive development through testing and engineering
